metadata.title: UrbanSafeHub
metadata.description: Community map to share and rate places

map.searchZonesEmpty: No visible zones match your search.
map.locationDeniedMessage: Location access was denied. The map stays centered on Lima.
map.locationUnavailableMessage: We could not get your current location. The map stays centered on Lima.
map.zoneCreatePanelSubtitle: Define a community-monitored perimeter and capture its first safety signals.
map.zoneCreateDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe landmarks, routes, or context that helps identify this zone.
map.zoneCreatePointHint: Click on the map to pick the center point.
map.zoneCreatePolygonHint: Click on the map to add vertices (minimum 3). Farthest vertices must be within {maxM} m.
map.zoneCreatePolygonDiameterExceeded: The polygon cannot span more than {maxM} m between its farthest vertices.
map.zoneCreateNameRequired: You must enter a name for the zone.
map.zoneCreatePointRequired: You must select one point on the map.
map.zoneCreatePolygonRequired: You must add at least 3 points for the polygon.
map.zoneCreateOverlapError: The zone you drew touches or intersects an existing zone.
map.zoneCreateFailedFallback: Unable to create zone. Please try again.
map.zoneCreateTermsAlert: Submit only real and verifiable information. False data can affect the whole community.
map.zoneCreateTermsCheckbox: I accept the terms and conditions to continue.
map.zoneCreateTermsRequired: You must accept the terms and conditions to continue.
map.zoneCreateInfrastructureCctvHint: Surveillance cameras present at this location.
map.zoneCreateRatingsHint: You must submit at least one rating before creating the zone.
map.zoneCreateRatingsRequired: You must submit at least one rating before creating the zone.
map.zoneDetailNoComments: No visible comments for this zone.
map.zoneDetailStatusSummarySafe: The community sees this area as steady and favorable for moving through most of the day.
map.zoneDetailStatusSummaryModerate: This zone shows mixed signals, so checking the time breakdown is recommended before passing through.
map.zoneDetailStatusSummaryDanger: Recent reports suggest extra caution, especially during lower-activity time windows.
map.zoneDetailStatusSummaryUnknown: There are not enough signals yet to describe how this zone behaves with confidence.
map.zoneDetailTrendCaption: Safety trend based on recent community signals.
map.zoneDetailVoteSubtitleAnonymous: Your contribution is anonymous. Share a quick perception for this time segment.
map.zoneDetailVoteSubtitleAuthenticated: Your vote is tied to your profile and you can update it whenever your perception changes.
map.zoneDetailVoteCurrentLabel: You already voted for this time segment. Sending again will update your current rating.
map.zoneDetailVoteErrorFallback: We could not save your rating. Please try again.
map.zoneDetailVoteRequired: You must rate the overall safety perception.
